nodes.name: 尼加拉瓜
nodes.summary: 尼加拉瓜是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联124种鸟类，包括山冠雉、Yucatan bobwhite、Spot-bellied bobwhite等124种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Pied puffbird
nodes.summary: Pied puffbird（Pied puffbird，学名 Notharchus tectus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联15个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of pied puffbird is found in southern Venezuela, the Guianas, and northern Amazonian Brazil as far east as the state of Maranhão

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of pied puffbird is found in southern Venezuela, the Guianas, and northern Amazonian Brazil as far east as the state of Maranhão

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species is generally resident throughout its range, but appears to make some irregular seasonal movements. The pied puffbird inhabits a variety of landscapes from savanna to the interior and edges of tropical evergreen forest
